heading: Return of permit; penalty for failure to return
label: 448 Return of permit; penalty for failure to return
text: Every permit issued in accordance with the provisions of sections 443 to 448 of this title, which may not be taken up by an inspector or deputy inspector, shall be returned within four days after issuance to the office of the supervisor of the harbor; such permit shall bear an indorsement by the master of the towboat, or the person acting in such capacity, stating whether the permit has been used, and, if so, the time and place of dumping. Any person violating the provisions of this section shall be liable to a fine of not more than $500 nor less than $100.
notes: References in TextSections 443 to 448 of this title, referred to in text, were in the original “this section of this Act”, meaning section 3 of act , which enacted sections 443 to 448 of this title. The provision of section 3 relating to issuance of permits is classified to .June 29, 1888section 443 of this title
